meta.title: FluxFiles — The file manager that embeds anywhere
meta.description: Open source PHP file manager with S3, R2, local storage. Embed via iframe + postMessage SDK.

hero.headline: The file manager that embeds anywhere
hero.sub: PHP ≥ 7.4 + Flysystem. Local, S3, Cloudflare R2 in one UI. 3 lines of JavaScript.

features.label: Features
features.headline: Everything a modern file manager needs
features.sub: Built for developers who need flexibility.
features.storage_desc: Local, AWS S3, Cloudflare R2 — swap with config, no code change.
features.embed_desc: iframe + postMessage SDK. 3 lines of JS. Works with any framework.
features.jwt_desc: Per-user path prefix, permission claims, disk whitelist.
features.seo_desc: Alt text, title, caption in SQLite. Synced to S3 object tags.
features.presign_desc: Browser uploads directly to S3/R2 — zero bandwidth on your server.
features.i18n_desc: Auto-detects browser language. RTL support. Add your own in 1 JSON file.
